factionAbilities.name: DISTANT SUNS
factionAbilities.effect: When you explore a planet that contains 1 of your mechs, you may draw 1 additional card; choose 1 to resolve and discard the rest.

factionAbilities.name: FABRICATION
factionAbilities.effect: ACTION: Either purge 2 of your relic fragments of the same type to gain 1 relic; or purge 1 of your relic fragments to gain 1 command token.

versions.effect: Purge 2 of your relic fragments of the same type to gain 1 relic. Then, return this card to the Naaz-Rokha player.

factionTechnologies.name: Supercharge
factionTechnologies.effect: At the start of a combat round, you may exhaust this card to apply +1 to the result of each of your unit's combat rolls during this combat round.

factionTechnologies.name: Pre-Fab Arcologies
factionTechnologies.effect: After you explore a planet, ready that planet.

abilities.name: Mech Bonus Die
abilities.effect: Your mechs in this system roll 1 additional die during combat.

mech.name: Eidolon
mech.note: NOT a researched unit-upgrade — a real-time double-sided unit card that flips based on combat timing, unrelated to the 'versions'/unitUpgrade mechanic used elsewhere in this project. Needs its own dedicated engine support later.

abilities.name: Flip on Space Combat Start
abilities.effect: If this unit is in the space area of the active system at the start of a space combat, flip this card.

backSide.name: Z-Grav Eidolon
backSide.note: Loses the Sustain Damage ability when in space.

abilities.name: Also a Ship
abilities.effect: If this unit is in the space area of the active system, it is also a ship.

abilities.name: Flip at Battle End
abilities.effect: At the end of a space battle in the active system, flip this card.

synergy.description: Tus tecnologías verdes pueden usarse como azules para prerrequisitos, y viceversa (no ambas a la vez).

breakthrough.note: Doble cara, distinto de cualquier otro Breakthrough — el reverso reemplaza la carta de mech por una unidad especial mientras esté activa. Necesita soporte propio en el motor más adelante, no encaja en el patrón estándar de 'ability' de texto.

ability.name: Absolute Synergy
ability.effect: When you have 4 mechs in the same system, you may return 3 of those mechs to your reinforcements to flip this card and place it on top of your mech card.

backSide.name: Eidolon Maximum
backSide.effect: This unit is both a ship and a ground force. It cannot be assigned hits from unit abilities. Repair it at the start of every combat round. Game effects cannot place or produce your mechs. When this unit is destroyed or removed, flip this card and return it to your play area.

agent.name: Garv and Gunn
agent.ability: At the end of a player's turn: You may exhaust this card to allow that player to explore 1 of their planets.

commander.name: Dart and Tai
commander.ability: After you gain control of a planet that was controlled by another player: You may explore that planet.

hero.name: Hesh and Prit
hero.ability: "PERFECT SYNTHESIS" — ACTION: Gain 1 relic and perform the secondary ability of up to 2 readied or unchosen strategy cards; during this action, spend command tokens from your reinforcements instead of your strategy pool. Then, purge this card.
